title: SelfHealingCodeTask
description: One bug-fix task for the self-healing code agent loop. The test is the ORACLE: exit code 0 means resolved. 'gold' is only used to (a) demo the harness with a perfect patcher and (b) compute an optional patch-similarity metric. The agent under test must NOT read 'gold'.

language.description: Only python in this starter set.

description.description: Human-readable bug summary (context for a real LLM patcher; not the fix).

entrypoint.description: Relative path of the file(s) the agent may edit, e.g. 'solution.py'.

buggy_dir.description: Dir with the broken code the loop starts from.

gold_dir.description: Dir with a known-good version. Oracle only - hidden from the agent.

test_dir.description: Dir with the test(s). Any test_*.py run with exit 0 == pass.

max_iterations.description: Loop budget: hard stop so the loop always terminates.
